class.description: Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. Vanilla MPPI implementation using sampling-based optimization with Gaussian noise. Supports differential drive robots with trajectory tracking and obstacle avoidance.
Log-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Log-space weight computation variant of MPPI for improved numerical stability. Serves as a base for importance sampling extensions.
Tsallis-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. q-exponential weight computation for exploration/exploitation balance control. q>1: heavy-tail (more exploration), q<1: light-tail (more exploitation).
Risk-Aware (CVaR) MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Conditional Value at Risk based weight truncation for conservative path planning. alpha<1: risk-averse (uses only best alpha fraction of samples).

Stein Variational MPC (SVMPC) controller plugin for nav2. SVGD kernel-based sample diversity for multi-modal distribution exploration. svgd_num_iterations=0: Vanilla equivalent, >0: SVGD loop enabled.
Smooth-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Kim et al. (2021) delta-u input-lifting for structurally smooth control. Optimizes in delta-u space with cumsum restoration and jerk cost penalty.
Spline-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. ICRA 2024 B-spline basis interpolation from P knots to N timesteps. P knots (P << N) with de Boor recursive basis for smooth sampling.
SVG-MPPI (Stein Variational Guided MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. Kondo et al. ICRA 2024. G guide particles with SVGD + follower resampling. Efficient multi-modal exploration with G << K.
Biased-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Trevisan & Alonso-Mora RA-L 2024. Ancillary controller biased sampling. Deterministic + Gaussian hybrid sampling with unchanged weight formula.
DIAL-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Xue et al. ICRA 2025. Diffusion-inspired annealing with dual decay schedule. N_diffuse inner iterations with Shield-DIAL (CBF) and Adaptive-DIAL extensions.
Shield-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Per-step CBF projection ensuring all sample trajectories satisfy h(x) > 0. Configurable stride and iteration count for performance tuning.
iLQR Warm-Start MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Uses 1-2 iLQR iterations to improve control_sequence before MPPI sampling. Based on IT-MPC (2018) and MPPI-IPDDP (2022). Overhead ~1.6%.

CS-MPPI (Covariance Steering) controller plugin for nav2. CoVO-MPC (CoRL 2023) based adaptive noise covariance via dynamics Jacobian B_t sensitivity. Per-step noise scaling: scale_t = clamp(||B_t||_F / mean, min, max). Overhead < 5%.

pi-MPPI (Projection MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. Andrejev et al. RA-L 2025. ADMM QP projection filter enforcing hard bounds on control magnitude, rate (du/dt), and acceleration (d²u/dt²). Guarantees smooth, feasible controls without post-hoc filtering.

MPPI-H (Hybrid Swerve MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. IROS 2024 (arXiv:2409.08648). Switches sampling space between Low-D (body velocity) and 4D (diagonal wheel pairs) in real-time based on tracking error. Supports both Coaxial and Non-Coaxial Swerve configurations.

Adaptive Shield-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Distance/velocity-adaptive CBF gamma: alpha(d,v) = alpha_min + (alpha_max - alpha_min) * exp(-k_d*d) * (1 + k_v*v). Close+fast = strong CBF, far+slow = weak CBF. Inherits Shield-MPPI per-step projection.

CLF-CBF-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Ames et al. (2019) CLF-CBF-QP unified safety filter. CLF (convergence) + CBF (safety) in single QP, slack relaxation for safety priority. Inherits Shield-MPPI per-step projection + CLF-CBF post-filter.
Predictive Safety MPPI controller plugin for nav2. N-step forward rollout CBF projection for recursive feasibility. Extends Shield-MPPI per-step projection to full horizon safety guarantee.

LP-MPPI (Low-Pass Filtering MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. 1st-order IIR low-pass filter on control sequences for high-frequency chattering removal. Complementary to Smooth-MPPI: Smooth=time domain (delta-u), LP=frequency domain (IIR).
Halton-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. MDPI Drones 2026. Halton low-discrepancy sequence replaces Gaussian noise. Uniform control space coverage with fewer samples (K) for faster convergence.
Feedback-MPPI (F-MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. RA-L 2026. Time-varying Riccati feedback gains K_t from MPPI rollout Jacobians. Inter-cycle linear feedback correction: u = u* + K_t·(x - x*).
Tube-MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Runs MPPI on nominal state and applies body frame feedback correction. Robust to disturbances via tube invariant set with ancillary feedback K_fb.
Multi-Agent MPPI controller plugin for nav2. ROS2 pub/sub trajectory sharing via nav_msgs::msg::Path. InterAgentCost penalizes proximity to other agents' predicted trajectories.
CUDA GPU-Accelerated MPPI controller plugin for nav2. CudaRolloutEngine for parallel K×N rollout + cost on GPU. CPU fallback when CUDA unavailable (isAvailable()=false).

RH-MPPI (Receding Horizon MPPI) controller plugin for nav2. Dynamic prediction horizon N adaptation based on speed, obstacle proximity, and tracking error. EMA smoothing prevents jitter. N_min to N_max range.

Auto-Selector MPPI controller plugin for nav2. Runtime context-aware strategy switching: CRUISE, PRECISE, AGGRESSIVE, RECOVERY, SAFE. EMA smoothing + hysteresis for jitter-free transitions. Params profile swap pattern.

Trajectory Library MPPI controller plugin for nav2. 7 pre-computed control sequence primitives (straight, turns, S-curves, stop, reverse) injected as deterministic samples for improved warm-start diversity and convergence.
